context.audience: Developer-marketers responsible for content-led growth, startup founders building content moats, technical content managers planning AI-assisted editorial calendars
pain_points: Planning content that balances AI efficiency with genuine expertise and authority
Building a content calendar that targets the right keywords with the right formats
Measuring content ROI and adjusting strategy based on performance data
Maintaining quality and brand voice consistency across AI-generated content
Competing in search when AI-generated content is flooding every niche
